author: fengzhe
description: PowerPoint-style layer controls for  Canvas: bring cards to front, send to back, move forward/backward, and preserve layer order when focusing overlapping cards. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: fengzhe
manifest.description: Reorder overlapping Canvas cards with bring forward, send backward, bring to front, and send to back commands.
manifest.name: Canvas Layer Order

name: Canvas Layer Order

releases.author: Laplacede
releases.description:
Startup reliability update.

Changes:
- Delay initial Canvas layer observer setup until the workspace layout is ready.
- This avoids a possible false startup load-failure notice while keeping behavior unchanged after startup.

Release assets for manual installation: main.js, manifest.json, styles.css.
releases.name: Canvas Layer Order 0.1.3

releases.author: Laplacede
releases.description:
Review compliance update.

Changes:
- Removed the plugin-name heading from the settings tab.
- Avoided unsafe view type calls in the Canvas view guard.
- Keeps document/window usage for lower app-version compatibility while leaving the popout compatibility warnings acknowledged.

Release assets for manual installation: main.js, manifest.json, styles.css.
releases.name: Canvas Layer Order 0.1.2

releases.author: Laplacede
releases.description:
Review compliance update.

Changes:
- Updated settings heading to use the standard Setting API.
- Removed redundant wording from the plugin manifest description.
- Replaced builtin-modules with Node's builtin module list.
- Tightened settings loading and cleaned up release build output.

Release assets for manual installation: main.js, manifest.json, styles.css.
releases.name: Canvas Layer Order 0.1.1

releases.author: Laplacede
releases.description:
Initial release of Canvas Layer Order.

Features:
- Bring Canvas cards to front or send them to back.
- Move Canvas cards forward or backward one layer.
- Access layer commands from the command palette, hotkeys, and the Canvas card context menu.
- Optional setting to preserve saved layer order when focusing cards.

Release assets for Obsidian manual installation: main.js, manifest.json, styles.css.
releases.name: Canvas Layer Order 0.1.0
